title: Coffee with You
content: Every Friday morning, Noah visited the same small coffee shop. One day, Olivia asked if she could share his table because the café was full. They spent the next hour talking while drinking warm coffee. They discovered they both loved old movies and homemade cakes. The following Friday, Olivia returned to the same table. Soon, it became their weekly tradition. The coffee was always good, but the conversations were even better. Noah realized he was looking forward to seeing Olivia more than drinking his favorite latte.
